**Determining strike announcement**

I need to evaluate if this document is about an upcoming strike. It has a title indicating a strike notice for four hours on January 28, 2025, and details about the involved organizations. The text mentions safety concerns at work, additional occupancy percentages, and the last guaranteed departures. Since it references a future date, I can confirm that this document is indeed announcing an upcoming strike. So, I'll set isStrike to true.
